name: Synup Social vs. Lucidya
hero_summary: Start taking charge of your socials. While Lucidya is great for social listening, it doesn’t give you control over your socials. With no posting, analytics, or content scheduling capabilities, it’s only a good solution if you want to watch, not participate, in social media. Start taking data-driven action with Synup Social. With revolutionary analytics, smart automated post scheduling, and content creation assistance, it’s the social media management tool you’ve been waiting for.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Take charge of your social media presence
section_2_summary: Ready to grow your socials? With Synup Social, you can power your social media strategy with revolutionary analytics. We’ll guide your posting strategy, so you can smash your engagement goals. It’s more than just listening - it’s joining the conversation. Here’s how we do it:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Post scheduling is just the beginning! Make your life a lot easier with Synup Social in your tool belt. Remove friction from social media management every step of the way and collaborate with your team and your clients. It all starts with a revolutionary approval workflow where you and your team can create drafts, edit each other's work, and get feedback and approval from your supervisors.
section_2_slider_2_summary: From intuitive approval workflows to advanced collaboration, join forces with your team or your customers to create a content calendar that everyone can get behind. With AI-powered post creation, you’ll be inspired to create your best posts yet! We supply on-trend suggestions that align with your brand image; and the more you use it, the better it gets. Goodbye, writers’ block!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Find what makes your followers tick
section_2_step_3_summary: Lucidya doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation OR strategy (or posting, for that matter!). Synup Social helps you grow. We’ll help you craft a winning strategy - and give you all the credit! AI-powered insights empower you to create a data-driven posting strategy that engages your audience and smashes your KPIs.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Ready to expand? Synup Social grows with your business, whether you’re an agency adding clients or you’re catering to local audiences with location-specific accounts. Synup Social makes it simple for brands with multiple locations to manage everything all on one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Lucidya?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Get ready to join the conversation. Synup Social inspires your team, empowers you to build better workflows, and delivers results with revolutionary analytics. No matter your goal, Synup Social is the perfect choice for agencies and brands alike! After all, With advanced insights that guide you from post creation to analytics, Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed. Let’s see how it stacks up against Lucidya:

seo.title: The Best Lucidya Alternative for Agencies and Brands | Synup Social
seo.description: Tired of Lucidya's lack of posting and engagement capabilities? Here's what to use as a Lucidya alternative.
